name: USS PC-1126 (PC-1126)
events: 4 Dec 1944 After a four day training period, USS Caiman (Cdr. F.C. Lucas, Jr., USN), departed Saipan for her patrol area. She was escorted out by USS PC-1126 (Lt. J.F. Carrere, USNR).
23 Dec 1944 Around 1530 K/23, USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) arrived at Saipan from Pearl Harbor.
She was escorted in by USS PC-1126 (Lt. J.F. Carrere, USNR) which had joined around 1000 K/23. (1)
24 Dec 1944 Around 1330 K/24, USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) departed from Saipan to resume her first war patrol. She was to patrol in the East China Sea off the Ryukyu Islands.
USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) was in company until 2300 K/25. USS Kraken was to patrol in the South China Sea, which was also her first war patrol.
They were escorted out until 1900 K/24 by USS PC-1126 (Lt. J.F. Carrere, USNR). (2)
26 Dec 1944 USS Aspro (Cdr. W.A. Stevenson, USN) departed Saipan for her patrol area. She was escorted out by USS PC-1126.
4 Jan 1945 USS Boarfish (Cdr. R.L. Gross, USN) arrived at Saipan. She was escorted in by USS PC-1126 (Lt. J.F. Carrere, USNR).
9 Jan 1945 USS Batfish (Cdr. J.K. Fyfe, USN) arrived at Guam for voyage repairs and to top off with fuel and provisions. She was escorted in by USS PC-1126 (Lt. J.F. Carrere, USNR).
14 Jan 1945 USS Atule (Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) arrived at Saipan. She was escorted in by USS PC-1126.

14 Jan 1945 Around 1130 K/14, USS Pompon (T/Cdr. S.H. Gimber, USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN), USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. G.W. Underwood, USN) arrived at Saipan from Majuro. They were escorted in by USS PC-1126 (Lt. J.F Carrere, USNR) which had joined around 0530 K/14.

At Saipan all four submarines were taken in hand for voyage repairs by USS Fulton (T/Capt. A.A. Clarkson, USN). En-route to Saipan, USS Jallao had received permission to have her bow planes modified which would take several days to accomplish. She was thus unable to depart the following day with the coordinated attack group and was replaced. (3)

15 Jan 1945 Around 1100 K/15, USS Devilfish (T/Cdr. E.C. Stephan, USN), USS Bang (T/Cdr. A.R. Gallaher, USN), USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. G.W. Underwood, USN) all departed Saipan for their patrol areas. They were escorted out until around 1720 K/15 by USS PC-1126 (Lt. J.F Carrere, USNR).
